ast.source: Write 3 reviews for other writers' projects this month.
ast.target: 本月为其他作者的项目撰写3篇评论。

ast.source: Write 5 reviews for other writers' projects this month.
ast.target: 本月为其他作者的项目撰写5篇评论。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Complete writing challenges in a bingo grid format. Mix up your routine with varied prompts and goals designed to push your creativity in new directions.
ast.target: 以宾果网格形式完成写作挑战。通过多样化的目标和提示来打破常规，激发你的创造力向新方向发展。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Write something every day. This challenge isn't about writing the most words; it's about building consistency and making writing a daily priority.
ast.target: 每天写作。这个挑战不在于写多少字，而在于建立一致性，让写作成为每日优先事项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Track your performance against your goals.
ast.target: 跟踪你的表现与目标的对比。

ast.name: description
ast.source: See words written, time spent, and average WPM for a chapter.
ast.target: 查看一个章节的写作字数、花费时间和平均WPM。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep track of how many consecutive days you've written.
ast.target: 记录你连续写作的天数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On a given day, see how many words you've written and when.
ast.target: 在特定日期，查看你写了多少字以及写作时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A chart showing how your project has evolved over time.
ast.target: 一张展示你的项目如何随时间演变的图表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maintain momentum after meeting your daily goal with automatically increasing stretch goals.
ast.target: 在达到每日目标后，通过自动增加的延伸目标来保持写作动力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Visualize how many words and minutes you've written over any number of projects for a given time period on your writing dashboard.
ast.target: 在你的写作仪表板上，可视化你在任意数量的项目上、在给定时间段内写了多少字和多少分钟。

ast.name: description
ast.source: See what day and what hour you write the most so you know what times you should protect to increase your word count.
ast.target: 查看你在哪一天、哪个小时写作最多，这样你就知道应该保护哪些时间段来增加你的字数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At your current WPM, see how long it will take you to finish your daily goal and other targets.
ast.target: 根据你当前的WPM，查看完成每日目标和其他目标需要多长时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The number of words you'll need to write per day to meet a deadline you specify.
ast.target: 为了达到你指定的截止日期，你每天需要写的字数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compare how many words you wrote to the same day last week and this week's (or month's) total vs. last to compete against yourself and push yourself to write more.
ast.target: 将你写的字数与上周同一天以及本周（或本月）的总数与上周进行比较，与自己竞争，推动自己写得更多。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hide, show, and reposition editor widgets to customize what you see when writing
ast.target: 隐藏、显示和重新定位编辑器小部件，以自定义写作时的视图

ast.name: description
ast.source: Motivate yourself to keep writing by taking a glance at the leaderboards.
ast.target: 通过浏览排行榜来激励自己继续写作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compete against yourself or others in timed or word goal writing sprints.
ast.target: 在计时或字数目标的写作冲刺中，与自己或他人竞争。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
High quality, defined, editing marks from professional editors, usable by readers so that they can learn how to give better feedback and provide that feedback 
    in a way that is easy to understand and automatically include examples.
ast.target: 来自专业编辑的高质量、明确的编辑标记，可供读者使用，以便他们学习如何提供更好的反馈，并以易于理解的方式提供反馈，且自动包含示例。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Reviews are associated to chapter versions. When you update a chapter and a review 
    was given on an older version, you know what version so that the review has context.
ast.target: 评论与章节版本相关联。当你更新章节且评论是基于旧版本给出的，你可以知道是哪个版本，从而为评论提供上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Track changes, just like Word or Google docs
ast.target: 跟踪更改，就像Word或Google文档一样

ast.name: description
ast.source: Crisp cyan and teal with warm accents
ast.target: 清爽的青色和蓝绿色，搭配温暖的点缀色

ast.name: description
ast.source: Natural greens with earthy amber and deep purple
ast.target: 自然的绿色，搭配朴实的琥珀色和深紫色

ast.name: description
ast.source: Warm deep-orange and rose with cool indigo contrast
ast.target: 温暖的深橙色和玫瑰色，搭配冷色调的靛蓝色形成对比

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deep purple and gold with teal flourish
ast.target: 深紫色和金色，搭配蓝绿色的点缀

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deep rose and sage green with navy accent
ast.target: 深玫瑰色和鼠尾草绿，搭配海军蓝点缀

ast.name: description
ast.source: Counts toward project total + daily stats
ast.target: 计入项目总数 + 每日统计

ast.name: description
ast.source: Daily stats & leaderboard only — not project total
ast.target: 仅用于每日统计和排行榜——不计入项目总数

ast.name: label
ast.target: 姓名（你希望被称呼的名字）

ast.name: label
ast.source: Create a project and start writing to see words per day
ast.target: 创建一个项目并开始写作以查看每日字数

ast.name: label
ast.source: Start writing to see minutes spent per day
ast.target: 开始写作以查看每日花费的分钟数

ast.name: label
ast.source: Words at the end of time

ast.name: title
ast.target: 添加/删除/插入字数（图表）

ast.name: title
ast.target: 跨项目每分钟字数（图表）

ast.name: title
ast.source: All typed words, ignores cut words
ast.target: 所有输入的字数，忽略删除的字

ast.name: title
ast.target: 添加/粘贴/删除字数合计

ast.name: title
ast.source: Set a deadline to see how many words you need to write per day to meet that deadline.
ast.target: 设定截止日期，查看每天需要写多少字才能按时完成。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Updates once every 20-30 words when writing.

ast.name: title
ast.source: Wait for at least one other person
ast.target: 等待至少一位其他参与者

ast.name: title
ast.source: Only counts words written on WritingHabit. Pasted content is excluded.
ast.target: 仅统计在WritingHabit上输入的字数。粘贴的内容不计入。
